idea-plugin.name: slop-chop
idea-plugin.description: Chop AI writing tells in Markdown and plain text. The plugin runs the local slop-chop binary as a language server through LSP4IJ: tells surface as diagnostics, and a code action chops the document in place. Install the binary and put it on your PATH first (brew install dcadolph/tap/slop-chop or go install github.com/dcadolph/slop-chop@latest). See slop-chop.com.
